name: Motion Garden
subtitle: Where Stillness Learns to Dance
desc: A garden that never stops becoming. Paint strokes bloom into flowers, photographs crystallize into glass sculptures, dance movements ripple through the air like visible wind. Every creative act plants a seed — and the garden remembers them all, growing wilder and more beautiful with each season of the soul.
note: 内容按三大类展示：视频（video）、照片（image）、文档（pdf/doc/txt）
